mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_user_post where post_id=#{postId}
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_user_post where user_id in
#{userId}
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_user_post(user_id, post_id, tenant_id) values
(#{item.userId},#{item.postId},#{item.tenantId})
mapper.select: select user_id from sys_user_post where post_id = #{postId}
